Public Member Functions

MB_IMeshBakerSettings GetMeshBakerSettings ()
 
void GetMeshBakerSettingsAsSerializedProperty (out string propertyName, out UnityEngine.Object targetObj)
 A settings holder could store settings in one of several places. We can't return a SerializedProperty because that would be editor only. Instead we return the parameters needed to construct a serialized property.
 
MB3_MeshBakerGrouperBehaviour CreateGrouper (ClusterType t)
 
void DeleteAllChildMeshBakers ()
 Removes all child MeshBakers for the current object.

 Organize a TextureBakers objects to be combined into groups and generate a MeshBaker child for each group.

A settings holder could store settings in one of several places. We can't return a SerializedProperty because that would be editor only. Instead we return the parameters needed to construct a serialized property.
